zh.lifeSummary: 當Gontinha Soares de Merlo - Riba de Vizela於大約1200年出生在葡萄牙時，她的父親Alferes-Mor Soeiro Raimundes de Riba de Vizela42歲，母親Urraca Viegas de Barroso28歲。她於1218年與João Pires Redondo在葡萄牙結婚。他們至少是5個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gontinha Soares de Merlo - Riba de Vizela于大约1200年出生在葡萄牙时，她的父亲Alferes-Mor Soeiro Raimundes de Riba de Vizela42岁，母亲Urraca Viegas de Barroso28岁。她于1218年与João Pires Redondo在葡萄牙结婚。他们至少是5个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Soares
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Carlos, Luis, Francisco, Luiz, Jorge, Mario, Miguel, Pedro, Joaquin, Sergio.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Paulo, Anabela, Henrique, Vasco, Agostinho, Duarte, Goncalo, Marcio, Serafim, Seraphine.
Portuguese: patronymic from the medieval personal name Sueiro, derived from Latin suarius ‘swineherd’ (see Spanish Suero ).
Spanish: northwestern variant of Suárez (see Suarez ), a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Suero
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Manuel, Fernando, Ramon, Ana, Jesus, Jorge, Julio, Luis, Orlando, Rafael.
Spanish: from the medieval personal name Suero, from Latin Suarius, from suarius ‘swineherd’, a typical nomen humilitatis (‘name as a sign of humility’) of the early Christian times.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Merlo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mario, Arturo, Jesus, Luis, Raul, Adan, Adela, Agustin, Azucena, Baldemar, Dalila.  Italian Aldo, Angelo, Carlo, Santo, Vito, Antonio, Carmela, Elvio, Enrico, Franco, Grazia, Mauro.

Italian and Spanish: nickname from Italian and medieval Spanish merlo ‘blackbird’ (from Latin merula). In the Middle Ages this bird seems to have been regarded at times as foolish and gullible, and at other times as cunning and wily. In some cases the surname may have arisen as a metonymic occupational name for a bird catcher. See also Merle 1.

variants.name: Merola
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Carmine, Marco, Sal, Alfonse, Guido, Lorenzo, Pasquale, Salvatore, Antonio, Carlo, Fiore.
Italian (southern): nickname from Neapolitan merula ‘female blackbird’, from Latin merula (see Merlo ).

variants.name: Merli
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Carlo, Gino, Luigi.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of   Merlo  .

variants.name: Merle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Etienne, Henri, Jean-Paul.

French, English (of Norman origin), German, and Dutch: nickname, possibly for a good or habitual singer or whistler, from Old French, Middle High German merle ‘blackbird’ (from Latin merula). See also Italian and Spanish Merlo .
French: habitational name from (Le) Merle, the name of several places in various parts of France.

variants.name: Merlos
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Fidel, Francisco, Jorge, Juan, Lazaro, Manuel, Miguel, Adelso, Alonso, Ana, Angel, Cesar.
Spanish and Portuguese: from the personal name Merlos (see Merlo ).

en.lifeSummary: When Gontinha Soares de Merlo - Riba de Vizela was born about 1200, in Portugal, her father, Alferes-Mor Soeiro Raimundes de Riba de Vizela, was 42 and her mother, Urraca Viegas de Barroso, was 28. She married João Pires Redondo in 1218, in Portugal. They were the parents of at least 5 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gontinha Soares de Merlo - Riba de Vizela est née environ 1200, à Portugal, son père, Alferes-Mor Soeiro Raimundes de Riba de Vizela, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Urraca Viegas de Barroso, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé João Pires Redondo en 1218, à Portugal. Ils ont eu au moins 5 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gontinha Soares de Merlo - Riba de Vizela um 1200 in Portugal geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alferes-Mor Soeiro Raimundes de Riba de Vizela 42 und ihre Mutter Urraca Viegas de Barroso 28. Sie hat 1218 in Portugal João Pires Redondo geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gontinha Soares de Merlo - Riba de Vizela è nata il circa 1200 nel Portogallo, sua padre, Alferes-Mor Soeiro Raimundes de Riba de Vizela, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Urraca Viegas de Barroso, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato João Pires Redondo nel 1218, nel Portogallo. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figlie.

ja.Santarém, Portugal: ポルトガルサンターeム
ja.lifeSummary: Gontinha Soares de Merlo - Riba de Vizelaが約1200年にポルトガルで生まれた時，父Alferes-Mor Soeiro Raimundes de Riba de Vizelaは42歳，母Urraca Viegas de Barrosoは28歳であった。1218年にポルトガルでJoão Pires Redondoと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Gontinha Soares de Merlo - Riba de Vizela(이)가 대략 1200년 포르투갈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alferes-Mor Soeiro Raimundes de Riba de Vizela(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Urraca Viegas de Barroso(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1218년 포르투갈에서 João Pires Redondo(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다.

historicEvents.title: Portugal
historicEvents.description: Portugal is one of the oldest nations in Europe having established its continental frontier as it is set today in 1297

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gontinha Soares de Merlo - Riba de Vizela nasceu aproximadamente 1200, em Portugal, seu pai, Alferes-Mor Soeiro Raimundes de Riba de Vizela, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Urraca Viegas de Barroso, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com João Pires Redondo em 1218, em Portugal. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gontinha Soares de Merlo - Riba de Vizela родилась около 1200 г. в местности Португалия, её отцу по имени Alferes-Mor Soeiro Raimundes de Riba de Vizela было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Urraca Viegas de Barroso, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени João Pires Redondo в 1218 г. в местности Португалия. У них было по крайней мере 5 дочерей.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gontinha Soares de Merlo - Riba de Vizela nació aproximadamente 1200, en Portugal, su papá, Alferes-Mor Soeiro Raimundes de Riba de Vizela, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Urraca Viegas de Barroso, tenía 28 años. Se casó con João Pires Redondo en 1218, en Portugal. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijas.
